_notes: The 'build' script now passes '--config webpack.config.prod.js' to
the webpack CLI. By default webpack looks for webpack.config.js, so
the explicit --config flag is required to use the production-tuned
Two parallel workflows are now in place:
- 'npm start'  → webpack-dev-server, in-memory bundle, fast rebuilds.
- 'npm run build' → optimized bundle written to ./dist for deployment.
A new dev dependency was added: clean-webpack-plugin. It clears the
dist folder before each production build so stale files do not linger.
name: understanding-typescript
author: Maximilian Schwarzmüller
